title: Open tasks report
excerpt:

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

i would like to get a weekly email of the open tasks i we have in the Deals.
the open tasks are sub-items of deals that are under certain status (not “Done” yet).
basically its enough to know that Deal “X” has open subitem.

thanks

chen

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chen,

A way to achieve this is by creating a filtered view of those tasks (/subitems) that are not done. You can pull the filtered view’s link and include it in the body of an automation notification - could something like this work for you?

posts.author: goldman (chen goldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca

sorry for the late reply.
looks interesting

will try that
thanks
chen
